subject: [MULTICLOUD] Log4j vulnerability fix
commit_message:
[MULTICLOUD] Log4j vulnerability fix

The fix in artifactbroker changing log4j version into 2.16

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1433

Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>
Change-Id: I032d7274446b40889cedba41103eed8bf7021717

entries.message:

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4380/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4380/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4380/ )
